task: Advanced high-value task: Finite-Capacity Plant Schedule Operational Guardrail Proposal. Scenario: a high-value system is approaching an engineering gate and the owner needs a defensible go/no-go packet for finite-capacity plant schedule. Embedded packet: Records: R1 duration_hours=49 due_day=76 machine_capacity_hours=6; R2 duration_hours=58 due_day=72 machine_capacity_hours=9; R3 duration_hours=44 due_day=87 machine_capacity_hours=5. Remediation options: O1 changes duration_hours by -12% cost=81500; O2 changes due_day by -18% cost=98300; O3 changes machine_capacity_hours by -25% cost=57700; max_budget=123600. Rules and constraints: minimize late jobs first then changeover; jobs cannot split across machines; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: write a specialist-facing memo that distinguishes calculation results, assumptions, missing inputs, and expert-review questions. Deliver finite_capacity_1.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
